creator: dawdler@blacklodge.dev
text:
Trying to run portlint fails:

# portlint -A /usr/ports/misc/py-lightning-utilities
Variable PY_DEPENDS is recursive.
	in /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.sanity.mk:76
	in /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk:1959
	in /usr/share/mk/bsd.port.mk:32
	in /usr/ports/misc/py-lightning-utilities/Makefile:27

FATAL ERROR: make(1) died with status 512 and returned '
make: stopped in /usr/ports/misc/py-lightning-utilities' at /usr/local/bin/portlint line 3902.
